Nikki Cates

AI-Era Recalibration Strategist | Leadership Architecture | Speaker

Founder, Strategic Transformations & URI · Army Veteran · Author · AI-Era Organizational Strategist

Burnout is the smoke alarm. Your Leadership Architecture is the fire.

Nikki Cates helps executives, boards, and organizations identify and dismantle the structural conditions producing burnout, attrition, and systemic exhaustion. She is the creator of the UNMASK Framework and author of the three-volume UNMASK Blueprint Series.
